lines.name: The Original Scripture

explicitModifiers.text: The Herald of the Scourge drops the Original Sin
Cannot have Inspiration
Maximum Resolve is 1
Cannot be used with Forbidden Tomes below level 83
This item is destroyed when applied to a Sanctum

lines.flavourText: "It's all here. The lie at the core of my faith. Maxarius was not the first chosen of Innocence. Maxarius was Innocence himself. A charlatan, a liar, and a power-seeker." - Lycia, the Heretic

lines.name: The Second Sacrament

explicitModifiers.text: The Herald of the Scourge deals 100% more Damage
The Herald of the Scourge takes 75% less Damage
The Herald of the Scourge drops the Winds of Fate
Cannot be used with Forbidden Tomes below level 83
This item is destroyed when applied to a Sanctum

lines.flavourText: "He took many of his people's traditions and gilded them, hollowed them. They rejected his new religion, and he and his followers were forced to depart the mountains for lands unknown." - Lycia, the Heretic

lines.name: The Power and the Promise

explicitModifiers.text: The Herald of the Scourge drops Eternal Damnation
Cannot have Inspiration
Cannot recover Resolve
Cannot be used with Forbidden Tomes below level 80
This item is destroyed when applied to a Sanctum

lines.flavourText: "Building on the fear and hatred that deified him, Innocence threatened an eternity of flames for nonbelievers. The newcomers wailed and threw themselves at his feet in the thousands." - Lycia, the Heretic

lines.name: The Blood of Innocence

explicitModifiers.text: The Herald of the Scourge drops the Balance of Terror
The Herald of the Scourge deals 50% more Damage
The Herald of the Scourge takes 50% less Damage
This item is destroyed when applied to a Sanctum

lines.flavourText: "After weeks of being pursued, the veiled traveller made her stand in a sandstorm. Somehow, she wounded a god. Innocence relented; his brother and the traveller made good their escape." - Lycia, the Heretic

lines.name: The Gilded Chalice

explicitModifiers.text: Duplicates up to 4 random Offer Rewards upon defeating the Herald of the Scourge
Cannot recover Resolve
Cannot be used with Forbidden Tomes below level 75
This item is destroyed when applied to a Sanctum

lines.flavourText: "He took the newcomers' symbol and made it his own. Finally, they flocked to him. Finally, he had the power and wealth he so desired." - Lycia, the Heretic

lines.name: The First Crest

explicitModifiers.text: Aureus Coins are converted to Experience upon defeating the Herald of the Scourge
This item is destroyed when applied to a Sanctum

lines.flavourText: "In pursuit of divinity, he tried many times to found a religion. Few followed his initial symbols and proverbs. He needed something greater. A symbol none could deny." - Lycia, the Heretic

lines.name: The First Crest

explicitModifiers.text: Aureus Coins are converted to Relics upon defeating the Herald of the Scourge
This item is destroyed when applied to a Sanctum

lines.flavourText: "In pursuit of divinity, he tried many times to found a religion. Few followed his initial symbols and proverbs. He needed something greater. A symbol none could deny." - Lycia, the Heretic

lines.name: The Hour of Divinity

explicitModifiers.text: Duplicates up to 2 random Offer Rewards upon defeating the Herald of the Scourge
Cannot have Boons
This item is destroyed when applied to a Sanctum

lines.flavourText: "They ascended together, one unwillingly. The vilified became black as coal, and the lauded, golden. After a lifetime of ambition, he finally had his heart's desire. It only cost him his brother." - Lycia, the Heretic

lines.name: The Night Lamp

explicitModifiers.text: The Herald of the Scourge drops an additional Forbidden Tome
No Resolve Mitigation, chance to Avoid Resolve loss or Resolve Aegis
This item is destroyed when applied to a Sanctum

lines.flavourText: "The newcomers were terrified of fire. He used their fear to control them, to lay the seeds of unquestioning faith. He claimed only his god could protect them." - Lycia, the Heretic
